## Entities.ITaskEntity interface

A reusable task template with runtime-computed properties. Extends ITaskData with requiredVariables extracted from the template.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface ITaskEntity extends IRawTaskEntity 
```
**Extends:** [IRawTaskEntity](./ts-chocolate.entities.irawtaskentity.md)
